title: rostellularia nagpurensis
intro: Rostellularia nagpurensis, also known as Nagpuri rostellularia, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Rostellularia nagpurensis is typically prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment in traditional medicine.
